docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOY MENG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADELE LAURENCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S WITNESS GOLDEN GATE COMMONS I RESIDENTIAL ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN KIALTY, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD. MATTER CONTINUED FOR PARTIES TO SUBMIT ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE PER HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PARTIES ARE NOT REQUIRED TO APPEAR IF THEY HAVE SUBMITTED FILINGS PRIORS TO THE OCT 10TH HEARING. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE OCTOBER HEARING, MATTER WILL BE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF JOY MENG RE: JOY MENG FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENG, JOY
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JOY MENG. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT ADELE LAURENCE. PARTIES COMPLIED WITH SUBMITTING ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE PER HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN'S REQUEST ON 10/04/2018 AND 10/09/2018. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
